arts.ttl: Ederson: Why Man Utd, Man City and Liverpool are scrambling to sign Atalanta star
arts.sum: Atalanta midfielder Ederson is a wanted man, with Manchester United, Manchester City and Liverpool all following the midfielder. Playing time could be particularly hard to come by at City and Liverpool, SciSports reports, yet both clubs offer Ederson greater development opportunities.

arts.ttl: Man Utd youngster could make club history after Ruben Amorim's show of faith
arts.sum: Godwill Kukonki has been in and amongst the Manchester United first team and has remained with the squad ahead of Thursday's Europa League clash - where he could make history

arts.ttl: Chelsea won’t believe their luck if Ruben Amorim makes this transfer decision for Man United
arts.sum: New Man United manager, Ruben Amorim, is going to live or die by the transfer decisions he makes over the next few windows, and the performances of his teams. It seems that Amorim has already broken his first promise since arriving at Old Trafford, with Stan Collymore also suggesting that all of his players should […] The post Chelsea won’t believe their luck if Ruben Amorim makes this transfer decision for Man United appeared first on CaughtOffside.

arts.ttl: 'It also depends' - Nani fires warning at Man United players after Ruben Amorim appointment
arts.sum: Nani is optimistic fellow countryman Ruben Amorim will succeed at Man United.

arts.ttl: 'It has to be' - Bruno Fernandes reveals Manchester United's biggest priority this season
arts.sum: Skipper Bruno Fernandes is hungry to experience European success with Man United this season.

arts.ttl: Juventus to hold talks with Man Utd and Man City for Nicolo Fagioli
arts.sum: Serie A side Juventus look interested in selling Nicolo Fagioli and they are now making attempts to attract buyers for the midfielder. Fabiana della Valle has reported that Juve sporting…

arts.ttl: Manchester United reveal how much it cost to sack Erik ten Hag and hire Ruben Amorim
arts.sum: Manchester United made the decision early in the season to sack Erik ten Hag and bring in Ruben Amorim as his replacement - but that came at a serious cost for the Old Trafford bosses

arts.ttl: Man United transfer news: Red Devils dealt blow 'in pursuit' of 10-goal attacker who could thrive in Ruben Amorim system
arts.sum: Chelsea head coach Enzo Maresca insists that Manchester United-linked Christopher Nkunku will not leave Stamford Bridge in January.

arts.ttl: Player offered to Manchester United and 3 clubs – ‘Cold war’ could see €80-120m move to Red Devils
arts.sum: Two days ago, Sport Mediaset reported Manchester United are ready to tempt Napoli star Khvicha Kvaratskhelia with an offer worth €9m per year. Italian journalist Ciro Venerato mentions Manchester United when providing the latest on the 23-year-old’s contract situation. He was a guest on Televomero’s Terzo Tempo Calcio Napoli and his comments are relayed by The post Player offered to Manchester United and 3 clubs – ‘Cold war’ could see €80-120m move to Red Devils appeared first on Sport Witness.

arts.ttl: Manchester United boss Ruben Amorim drops Luke Shaw hint ahead of Bodo/Glimt fixture
arts.sum: Man United defender Luke Shaw could be in line to start the Europa League clash with Bodo/Glimt at Old Trafford.
